title: The Adventures of Bullwhip Griffin
writer: Lowell S. Hawley, Albert Sidney Fleischman
actors: Roddy McDowall, Suzanne Pleshette, Karl Malden
plot: Adventurous Bostonian Jack Flagg heads west to join the California gold rush with the hopes of restoring his family fortune, but his dedicated butler Bullwhip Griffin sets out to find Flagg and bring him back home.
